song.title: Fade, Fade Each Earthly Joy
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C Fade, fade, each earthly joy. .G D Jesus is mine. .G C Break every tender tie. .D G Jesus is mine. .C G Dark is the wilderness. .D G Earth has no resting place. .C G Jesus alone can bless. .D G Jesus is mine.
[V2] Tempt not my soul away. Jesus is mine. Here would I ever stay. Jesus is mine. Perishing things of clay, Born but for one brief day, Pass from my heart away. Jesus is mine.
[V3] Farewell, ye dreams of night. Jesus is mine. Lost in this dawning bright. Jesus is mine. All that my soul has tried, Left but a dismal void. Jesus has satisfied. Jesus is mine. .. .. .. .. --- [V4] Farewell, mortality. Jesus is mine. Welcome, eternity. Jesus is mine. Welcome, O loved and blest. Welcome, sweet scenes of rest. Welcome, my Savior's breast. Jesus is mine.
